articles.title: UCLA honors its history while making more of it with NCAA championship: 'We had a feeling this was our time'
articles.description: Now UCLA's storied sports history includes the 2026 women's team, which won in dominant fashion on Sunday to secure its first NCAA championship.

articles.title: Tories pledge to scrap carbon taxes on industry
